category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line tool and runtime for the Clarity smart contract language; official Hiro page describes writing, testing, and deploying Clarity smart contracts on Stacks.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is clarinet; official Hiro product page and GitHub README use Clarinet.
docs_sources: Official Hiro Clarinet page links to Install Clarinet and docs.hiro.so; the docs currently redirect into Stacks documentation reference pages with Clarinet CLI reference navigation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Clarity smart contracts; official Hiro page describes Stacks, Clarity, CLI testing, deployment, and runtime workflows.
